items.title: Belmont University to House Johnny Cash’s Personal Archives
items.summary: The archives will be part of the new Johnny Cash Learning Center at Belmont University's Mike Curb College of Entertainment & Music Business.

items.title: Charli XCX – “If You Take Away The Music, Then What Has She Got?”
items.summary: Only two days until Music, Fashion, Film, but Charli XCX isn't done with the rollout. We got the latest single "Camera" on Tuesday (July 21), but she still has B-sides in store. Previous B-sides are "I Keep Thinking About You Every Single Day And Night" and "Playboy Bunny," and today she's sharing the final B-side, "If You Take Away The Music, Then What Has She Got?," which she debuted in Brooklyn the other weekend.

items.title: Trusselina – “Gastro” & “Trusselina Archimboldi”
items.summary: Mikaela Oppenheimer used to be in the Brooklyn emo band Hello Mary, while Hayden McGarvey is a former member of the Philadelphia shoegaze crew Bleary Eyed. The two of them got to know each other when their bands toured together in 2024, and now they've joined forces to form Trusselina, a new duo whose music doesn't sound anything like their previous two bands.

items.title: Wild Pink – “500 Is The New 250”
items.summary: Wild Pink's upcoming album Still Coming Down feels a lot like MJ Lenderman cosplay, but can we even be mad about it? It sounds good, and Lenderman himself works on the record, so he must not mind. "500 Is The New 250" — which follows "Round Of Applause At The End Of The World" and "Box Store" — has a man taking a Cybertruck to his favorite bar (poetically called Hard Luck) to bet on his phone and drink alone.
